name: AMDA International Medical Information Center
description: Multilingual medical consultation hotline. Helps find English-speaking doctors and provides medical information in multiple languages.

name: TELL Lifeline
description: English-language counseling and support service. Provides free, anonymous telephone counseling for anyone in Japan.

name: Tokyo Metropolitan Health and Medical Info Center (Himawari)
description: Tokyo's multilingual medical information service. Helps find hospitals and clinics, available in English, Chinese, Korean, Thai, and Spanish.

name: Immigration Services Agency of Japan
description: Official government agency handling visas, residence cards, and immigration procedures. The Information Center provides guidance in multiple languages.

name: National Health Insurance (NHI) Official Information
description: Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare official page explaining the National Health Insurance system for residents of Japan.

name: Emergency Number 119 (Ambulance / Fire)
description: Japan's emergency number for ambulance and fire services. Free to call from any phone, available 24 hours. Some areas have multilingual support.

name: Emergency Number 110 (Police)
description: Japan's police emergency number. Free to call from any phone, available 24 hours.

name: Japan Helpline
description: 24-hour emergency assistance in English. Provides support for a wide range of problems including accidents, illness, and general life issues.

name: My Number Card Information (Digital Agency)
description: Official information about the My Number system and My Number Card from the Digital Agency of Japan.

name: CLAIR (Council of Local Authorities for International Relations)
description: Multilingual living guides covering daily life topics for foreign residents in Japan. Available in 14 languages.
